heroDescription: OMW — On My Way offers high-quality fuel, auto services, and everything else you need for your journey, with fast and friendly service 24 hours a day.
thirdText: Honest and reliable service for every customer
servicesTitle: Everything you need along the way
servicesDescription: From high-quality fuel to additional services for your vehicle and comfort, we are here to make every stop faster, safer, and more convenient.
serviceText1: Diesel and gasoline with high standards for safe and consistent performance.
serviceText2: Stay and enjoy our hotel located in Vorë.
serviceText3: Basic checks, oils, and quick assistance for your car’s everyday needs.
serviceText4: Everyday products, water, drinks, and essential items for your journey.
serviceText5: Take a short break with coffee, refreshing drinks, and snacks for every traveler.
serviceText6: Friendly staff, a clean environment, and service available to assist you at any time.
